containers.name: cam1
command: ffmpeg -y -nostdin -i "${CAM1_SOURCE}" -ac 2 -filter_complex "[0:v] scale=${WIDTH}:${HEIGHT},fps=${FRAMERATE} [v]; [0:a] aresample=${AUDIORATE} [a]" -map "[v]" -map "[a]" -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:v rawvideo -c:a pcm_s16le -f matroska tcp://localhost:${CAM1_PORT}

containers.name: cam2
command: ffmpeg -y -nostdin -i "${CAM2_SOURCE}" -ac 2 -filter_complex "[0:v] scale=${WIDTH}:${HEIGHT},fps=${FRAMERATE} [v]; [0:a] aresample=${AUDIORATE} [a]" -map "[v]" -map "[a]" -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:v rawvideo -c:a pcm_s16le -f matroska tcp://localhost:${CAM2_PORT}

containers.name: cam3
command: ffmpeg -y -nostdin -i "${CAM3_SOURCE}" -ac 2 -filter_complex "[0:v] scale=${WIDTH}:${HEIGHT},fps=${FRAMERATE} [v]; [0:a] aresample=${AUDIORATE} [a]" -map "[v]" -map "[a]" -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:v rawvideo -c:a pcm_s16le -f matroska tcp://localhost:${CAM3_PORT}

containers.name: cam4
command: ffmpeg -y -nostdin -stream_loop -1 -i "${CAM4_SOURCE}" -filter_complex "[0:v] format=yuv420p,scale=${WIDTH}:${HEIGHT}:out_range=tv,fps=${FRAMERATE},setparams=color_primaries=bt709:color_trc=bt709:colorspace=bt709 [v]; [0:a] aresample=${AUDIORATE} [a]" -map "[v]" -map "[a]" -color_primaries bt709 -color_trc bt709 -colorspace bt709 -color_range tv -c:v rawvideo -c:a pcm_s16le -f matroska tcp://localhost:${CAM4_PORT}

containers.name: intro
command:
while true; do
  ffmpeg -loglevel quiet -nostats -re \
    -i "${INTRO_VIDEO}" \
    -f lavfi -i anullsrc=r=${AUDIORATE}:cl=stereo \
    -pix_fmt yuv420p -s "${WIDTH}x${HEIGHT}" -r "${FRAMERATE}" \
    -c:v rawvideo -c:a pcm_s16le \
    -map 0:v:0 -map 1:a:0 \
    -shortest \
    -f matroska tcp://127.0.0.1:${INTRO_PORT} 2>/dev/null
  sleep 1
done

containers.name: stream-blanker
command:
ffmpeg -nostats -loglevel warning -stream_loop -1 -re \
  -i "${PAUSE_VIDEO}" \
  -pix_fmt yuv420p -s "${WIDTH}x${HEIGHT}" -r "${FRAMERATE}" \
  -c:v rawvideo -an -f matroska tcp://127.0.0.1:${BLANKER_PAUSE_PORT} &
ffmpeg -nostats -loglevel warning -stream_loop -1 -re \
  -i "${OFFLINE_VIDEO}" \
  -pix_fmt yuv420p -s "${WIDTH}x${HEIGHT}" -r "${FRAMERATE}" \
  -c:v rawvideo -an -f matroska tcp://127.0.0.1:${BLANKER_OFFLINE_PORT} &
wait
